projects.name: shop-saver
projects.description: Full-stack app with separate backend, frontend and service modules. Python + TypeScript + Rust, orchestrated with Docker Compose and an init.sql bootstrap.

projects.name: winwin-shop
projects.description: Freelance work for a real client — an e-commerce shop built and shipped end-to-end: storefront, catalog and checkout flow. The code belongs to the client, so the repo stays private — but I'm happy to walk through the build.

projects.name: music-genre-classification
projects.description: Python experiments for classifying music by genre — client/server scripts for inference plus a small QML UI prototype on top.
